notes: Solid, complete Pong implementation with proper ball physics, CPU AI, scoring, pause, and audio; minor issue is the ball is a square rather than a circle and CPU paddle position (x=756) leaves a small gap from the right edge visually.
An exceptionally well-crafted, flawless implementation of Pong with perfect collision math, solid AI, and great game feel.

Solid Pong implementation with working scoring, AI, pause, and collisions, but minor design issues like both paddles resetting every round and slightly imperfect UX/physics keep it short of excellence.
